1776186786358-ky2tzf.question: What is your return policy?
1776186786358-ky2tzf.answer: For questions about refunds or cancellations, please reach out directly — jimmy@jimmypotters.com or (703) 862-1300. We're happy to help! 🏺

1776202657211-jci81y.question: what paint color do i get with the kit
1776202657211-jci81y.answer:
The Home Pottery Kit ($100) includes:

1. 2KG air-dry clay
2. Paint set (pastel, floral, earth, or classic tones)
3. Sculpting tools in canvas bag
4. 2 fine paintbrushes
5. Waterproof varnish (glossy or matte)
6. Pre-formed clay shapes
7. Gift-ready branded box
8. Video tutorial access

No kiln needed — air dries in 24-48 hours! 🏺
